query: Microsoft 365 Copilot app redesign chat-centered layout release date 2025

mako.raw:
{"query":"Microsoft 365 Copilot app redesign chat-centered layout release date 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":2649,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/microsoft365copilotblog/what%E2%80%99s-new-in-microsoft-365-copilot--may-2026/4522010","title":"What’s New in Microsoft 365 Copilot | May 2026 | Microsoft Community Hub","content":"The refreshed design in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app delivers a more streamlined, chat-centered experience.
These updates simplify the chat and response layout, improve navigation, and introduce new ways for users to organize work.
We are maintaining our existing certification for Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat, Microsoft Security Copilot, and Microsoft Foundry (first certified in 2025 by Mastermind Assurance, an IAS-accredited certification body).
This feature rolled out to GA in March, GCC-High in May, and is rolling out to DoD in June.
Please note that the dates mentioned in this article are tentative and subject to change."},{"url":"https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/copilot/release-notes","title":"Release Notes for Microsoft 365 Copilot | Microsoft Learn","content":"3 days ago — 2026 Updates released between June 17, 2026, and July 01, 2026. Long running agents now display task status icons and progress indicators. This ...
Microsoft 365 Copilot release notes
Say "Hey Siri, open Copilot" to launch the app using voice.
A License filter will allow users to switch between All, M365 Copilot (licensed), and Copilot Chat (unlicensed) views
Why: This change creates a more modern and unified experience across Microsoft AI surfaces.
Connect 15Five with Microsoft 365 Copilot to bring team priorities and recognition into Copilot experiences.
Review the new Copilot video generation setting in the Microsoft 365 admin center.
Remove distracting backgrounds from photos before placing them into layouts.
Integrate your Microsoft Foundry agent with Microsoft 365 using Agents Toolkit sample."},{"url":"https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/blog/2026/05/28/introducing-a-new-design-for-microsoft-365-copilot/","title":"Introducing a new design for Microsoft 365 Copilot | Microsoft 365 Blog","content":"We’ve redesigned the Copilot app and how Copilot shows up across Microsoft 365 apps to better move with it: cleaner, faster, and in the flow of your work.
Our new designs introduce a more intentional interface and a faster, more responsive experience.
Since rolling out the new in-app experiences, Copilot usage has increased by 27% in Word, 33% in Excel, 43% in PowerPoint, and 30% in Outlook.4
These updates are more than a refreshed interface.
For Outlook, results reflect a comparison of daily active usage from January 27-February 24, 2026 after rollout versus December 30, 2025-January 27, 2026 before rollout."},{"url":"https://mc.merill.net/message/MC1266021","title":"MC1266021 - Microsoft 365 Copilot: New chat-first design for the Copilot mobile app | Microsoft 365 Message Center Archive","content":"Microsoft 365 Copilot mobile app is updating to a new chat-first design with a modern interface and streamlined navigation, rolling out mid-May to late August 2026 on iOS and Android.
We are introducing a refreshed chat‑first design in the Microsoft 365 Copilot mobile app.
This update modernizes the interface and streamlines navigation to make it faster and easier for users to start, continue, and manage chats.
Public Preview: Rolling out in mid-May 2026 (previously late April) and expected to complete in late June 2026."}]}

Microsoft is rolling out a simplified design for the Microsoft 365 Copilot web and desktop app in June 2026, after a May preview, bringing changes to the chat home screen, response layout, and navigation pane across Windows, Mac, and the web. It is something more telling: Microsoft has decided that Copilot’s problem is no longer merely capability, but comprehension. The company is trying to make its flagship workplace AI feel less like a bolted-on experiment and more like the front door to Microsoft 365.
